MINI MINUTES: This casuse came as Reassigment from PJ Department for Court Trial.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Mitch Lyon, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Appearances:
J. Michael Phelps, Esq. for Plaintiff Luisito C. Ferrer, also present, sworn & examined.
No appearance by defendants.
Plaintiff's Exhibits --- ID/EV
Exh. 1- Basis of estimated parking
Exh. 2- Tax Collector's computation of estimated parking
Exh. 3- Letter from CCSF dated November 21, 2000
Exh. 4- Abstract of Judgment entered June 18, 2001
Exh. 5- Abstract of Judgment entered June 23, 2003
Exh. 6- Letter to defendants dated October 30, 2001
Exh. 7- Letter from Domingo Cosino dated November 9, 2001
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Luisito C. Ferrer and against the defendants Domingo Cosino, Minda U. Cosino and CIC Parking.
Principal of $62,202.80
Interest $15,550.70 ($622.028/mox25mo)
Costs of $383.00
For the total of $78,136.50
Counsel to submit written judgment.
